title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Claude Code is used to build responsive client websites with integrated CMS functionality that allows non-technical clients to edit content. The workflow combines Claude's code generation with Vercel hosting and MongoDB for backend persistence, enabling rapid website deployment and client management.
